proposal.hypothesis: The conservative residual improved the light plant but could not counter the heavy weak-actuator mismatch; doubling only residual authority may let PPO correct that plant without changing its data budget or uncertainty assumptions.
proposal.expectedEffect: Improve heavy/weak survival and signed forward progress while retaining light/strong forward capability and locked regression gates.

gateReasons: light-strong: forward-progress regressed from passing to failing
light-strong: signed-forward-progress regressed from passing to failing
light-strong: backward-displacement regressed from passing to failing
light-strong: planar-velocity-tracking regressed from passing to failing
light-strong: yaw-rate-tracking regressed from passing to failing
